checks.item: Pipeline stepper is keyboard-operable (native <button type="button" class="pipeline-step"> in renderPipelineStepper; CSS resets .pipeline-step as button)
Input labels associated via for/id in index.html (e.g. project-search, lang-select, scan-dir, case filters, create modal fields, LLM config card); sr-only labels where controls are visually unlabeled
Create project modal focus trap (showCreateModal calls _trapFocus(overlay); Tab cycles first/last focusable; handler removed in hideCreateModal)
Error toasts use role="alert" (and aria-live="assertive") when type === "error" in toast()
Dynamic regions: #pipeline-stepper aria-live="polite"; #toast-container role="status" aria-live="polite"; cases and run history tables aria-live="polite"
